name: JDs Golf Garage & Golf Simulators
about: JD's Golf Garage is a multi-faceted venue offering indoor golf simulation and a retail pro shop. The facility features a commercial-grade Foresight Golf Simulator for tee time bookings and league play. It is equipped with cutting-edge AI technology to provide a true-to-life golf experience. The venue also maintains a large inventory of pre-owned golf clubs and accessories. Their league structure involves team registrations with players responsible for individual simulator rental costs. The space is designed to be an 'ultimate golf cave' suitable for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Ability to play on world's most famous courses indoors, rain or shine
Regular leagues and tournaments with cash prizes
Extensive inventory of premium pre-owned clubs for purchase

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on premises.
No mention of alcohol service on premises.

simulator_hardware.notes: Commercial-grade simulator with cutting-edge AI technology.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are responsible for bringing your own clubs, or you can rent them from the extensive inventory of pre-owned clubs available for purchase at JD's Golf Garage.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any food or drink service, and there is no information regarding a BYOB policy. It is best to contact the venue directly to inquire.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For leagues, each team plays 9 holes per week, which typically takes 1 to 1.5 hours on the simulator. Standard 18-hole play duration is not specified.

faq.question: Is JD's Golf Garage kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly, offering a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all levels and promoting family participation in their leagues and activities.
